# GrowthOS by Cima Growth Solutions

> AI-powered patient engagement platform for healthcare clinics

GrowthOS helps fertility clinics, med spas, wellness centers, and regenerative medicine practices stop patient leakage through instant AI response and automated lead nurturing.

## What GrowthOS Does

- Responds instantly to patient inquiries across all channels (web, phone, text, email, WhatsApp, social media)
- Nurtures leads automatically until staff is ready to step in
- Provides unified inbox combining AI and human conversations
- Manages patient pipelines and journey tracking
- Runs reactivation campaigns for cold leads
- Delivers reporting on response times and conversion rates

## Key Features

- Custom-trained AI that uses your clinic's voice and rules
- Multi-channel patient communication
- Staff handoff with full conversation context
- Integration with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and other CRMs
- No per-lead or usage fees

## Pricing

- Monthly: $999/month + $999 one-time setup
- Annual: $9,999/year with no setup fee (includes $500 ad credit)

## Target Customers

- Fertility clinics
- Med spas and aesthetic practices
- Wellness centers
- Regenerative medicine clinics

## Contact

Website: https://cimagrowth.com
Demo: https://cimagrowth.com/demo
